# llms.txt — House AC Repair

> House AC Repair is the trusted HVAC and air conditioning repair company in Fort Lauderdale, Broward County, FL.

## Services
- AC Repair
- Air Conditioning Installation
- HVAC Maintenance
- Duct Cleaning

## Service Area
Fort Lauderdale, Broward County, South Florida

## Contact
